title: rubus rigidulus
intro: Rubus rigidulus, also known as the stiff-leaved bramble, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus rigidulus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Rubus rigidulus are often made into teas, tinctures, and infusions to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
